typography.pairing_strategy: Use Manrope for all functional UI, body copy, and secondary headings (technical, sterile, precise). Use Fraunces explicitly for large manifesto numbers, signature quotes, and high-impact elegant moments (artistic, emotional contrast).

scales.hero_title: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[6rem] leading-[0.9] tracking-tighter font-medium

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] hover:border-[#1D35FF]/30 transition-colors duration-500
visual_enhancers.automotive_motifs: Subtle curved SVG background lines (stroke width 1px, opacity 0.1) imitating wind tunnel/speed lines. Use 'gauge' or 'dial' style circular progress for specific skills. Do NOT overdo it—keep it abstract.
visual_enhancers.clipped_frames: Real images should be placed inside sharp rectangles or slightly rounded (rounded-lg) containers, heavily desaturated or black-and-white by default, transitioning to full color on hover.
visual_enhancers.spotlight_effect: A soft radial gradient behind primary elements (like the hero text or featured project) using 'radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(29,53,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%)'.

image_urls.description: Dark moody portrait for the designer profile image. Apply grayscale with hover effect.
Neon recording studio aesthetic for the Featured Project background/context.
Red/Neon vibe for the studio booking app case study.
Clean sketchbook/wireframe aesthetic for the Design Process section.

layouts.hero: 100vh height. Kinetic layout. Left: Massive H1 text 'Designing Intuitive Digital Experiences That People Love' with a strict masked line-by-line Framer Motion reveal. Right/Bottom: Clipped portrait photo overlapping a subtle #1D35FF curved abstract vector line. Include a custom signature loading animation (SVG path drawing) that resolves into the hero.
layouts.marquee: Full-width overflow-hidden. Very slow editorial marquee (using react-fast-marquee). Text: 'UI/UX DESIGNER • PROBLEM SOLVER • CREATIVE DEVELOPER'. Styling: text-transparent text-stroke-1 text-stroke-white text-8xl font-fraunces.
layouts.about_manifesto: Bento-style or asymmetrical grid. Numbered chapters (e.g., '01', '02') using giant Fraunces typography in #1D35FF. Beside the number, a clean Manrope paragraph detailing passion, user-centered approach, and continuous learning.
layouts.skills_and_tools: High density grid. Skills represented as automotive-inspired minimalist 'dials' or progress arcs. Tools (Figma, Framer, etc.) presented as glassmorphic chips that float slightly on hover.
layouts.featured_project: Studio Spot (booking platform). Immersive section. Large clipped image of the neon studio/UI. Text content: Problem, Research, User Flow, UI, Outcome. Use overlapping cards with high backdrop-blur over the neon imagery.
layouts.design_process: Horizontal or winding 'track' layout (referencing automotive). Empathize → Define → Research → Ideate → Wireframe → Prototype → Test. Connected by a glowing #1D35FF SVG line that draws itself on scroll.
layouts.contact: Large, bold typography 'LET'S TALK' in Fraunces. A clean, minimal form mapped to MongoDB (via backend). Links to LinkedIn, Behance. Footer must be dense and architectural.

components.button: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Dark variant: bg-transparent border border-[#1D35FF] text-[#1D35FF] hover:bg-[#1D35FF] hover:text-white. Solid variant: bg-[#1D35FF] text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black. Transitions must be fluid.
components.card: Glassmorphism base: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05]. No harsh drop shadows; rely on inner borders and ambient background glows.
components.input: bg-transparent border-b border-white/[0.2] focus:border-[#1D35FF] text-white py-4 px-0 outline-none transition-colors rounded-none. No default HTML inputs.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #A1A1AA text passes contrast on #050505. Avoid pure #1D35FF text on dark backgrounds without sufficient font weight.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap Framer Motion hooks with useReducedMotion to disable heavy parallax for sensitive users.
accessibility.data_testids: MANDATORY: Add semantic kebab-case data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme #050505 and #1D35FF electric blue accent. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue.
Implement the custom font pairing (Fraunces + Manrope) via next/font or Google Fonts CDN.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding rigid generic UI components (like standard Shadcn cards) in favor of the custom glassmorphism aesthetic.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout wrapper.
Ensure the hero text uses a staggered overflow-hidden line reveal animation (Framer Motion).
All image treatments must follow the 'clipped frame' desaturated-to-color hover logic.
Create the contact form and handle the MongoDB backend connection as specified.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make this portfolio feel like an Awwwards Site of the Day.
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers or dropdowns—always use a backdrop-blur.
DO NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add explicit transitions to properties like background-color, border-color, and opacity.
DO NOT center align app containers (no .App { text-align: center }). Use asymmetrical, left-aligned structural grids.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index) and ambient lighting behind sections.
Never use generic AI emojis (🤖💡) for icons. Use high-quality SVG libraries like Phosphor or Lucide.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover state, focus state).
